---
description: Explore multiple ways to implement a feature
---

Analyze the following feature request and generate 3–5 different implementation approaches.

For each approach:
- explain the idea in simple terms
- list pros and cons
- estimate complexity (low / medium / high)
- identify impact on UI speed and readability
- suggest when this approach is best

Then recommend the best option for a fast, clean, low-maintenance dashboard.

Feature:
${input:feature}
